programme.title: Apocalypse Clown

programme.title: Mr. Turner
programme.desc: Timothy Spall stars in Mike Leigh's biographical drama, which presents scenes from the final 25 years of English Romantic landscape artist JMW Turner's life. Some sexual scenes.

programme.title: Their Finest
programme.desc: In 1940, two screenwriters, one of them married, develop a growing attraction while working together on a propaganda film about the evacuation of Allied troops from Dunkirk, France.

programme.title: Oranges And Sunshine
programme.desc: "Oranges and Sunshine" tells the story of Margaret Humphreys, a social worker from Nottingham who uncovered one of the most significant social scandals of recent times: the deportation of thousands of children from the United Kingdom to ...

programme.title: McClaren
programme.desc: The story of Bruce McLaren, the New Zealander who showed the world that a man of humble beginnings could take on the elite of motor racing and win.

programme.title: Bend It Like Beckham
programme.desc: Comedy with Parminder Nagra and Keira Knightley. Two teen girls join a female football team. But Jess's Sikh parents don't approve. Language that some viewers may find offensive.

programme.title: Ammonite
programme.desc: In 1840s England, acclaimed but overlooked fossil hunter Mary Anning and a young woman sent to convalesce by the sea develop an intense relationship, altering both of their lives forever.

programme.title: Le Week-End
programme.desc: A long-married couple revisit Paris for a long weekend for the first time since their honeymoon, in hopes of rekindling their relationship - or, perhaps, to bring it to an end.

programme.title: Alone In Berlin
programme.desc: WWII drama with Emma Thompson and Brendan Gleeson. After their son is killed in battle, a German couple start to leave postcards around Berlin denouncing the Nazi regime.

programme.title: Hope Gap
programme.desc: A woman learns her husband is leaving her for someone else after 29 years of marriage, but after feeling displaced in her small, seaside town, she ultimately finds the strength within herself to discover a new and powerful voice.

programme.title: The Seagull
programme.desc: A tragicomedy unfolds when friends and family gather at a retreat where everyone is caught up in loving someone who loves someone else.

programme.title: Churchill
programme.desc: Ninety-six hours before the World War II invasion of Normandy, British Prime Minister Winston Churchill struggles with his severe reservations with Operation Overlord and his increasingly marginalized role in the war effort.

programme.title: The Almond and The Seahorse
programme.desc: What happens when you're ambushed by time? An archaeologist and an architect fight to re-imagine a future after traumatic brain injury leaves them adrift from the people they love.

programme.title: What We Did On Our Holiday
programme.desc: A family of five is off to Granddad's big 75th birthday party at an uncle's estate in rural Scotland. The parents are separated and hope their three kids won't mention it. The kids love, can talk with, and will do anything for, Granddad.

programme.title: Le Week-End
programme.desc: A long-married couple revisit Paris for a long weekend for the first time since their honeymoon, in hopes of rekindling their relationship - or, perhaps, to bring it to an end.

programme.title: Beast (2017)
programme.desc: BAFTA-winning drama starring Jessie Buckley. A fragile young woman begins a potentially dangerous relationship with an outsider. Disturbing violence/some strong language.

programme.title: Alone In Berlin
programme.desc: WWII drama with Emma Thompson and Brendan Gleeson. After their son is killed in battle, a German couple start to leave postcards around Berlin denouncing the Nazi regime.

programme.title: The Seagull

programme.title: Stardust (2020)
programme.desc: The story of singer David Bowie's first visit to America is chronicled, as he reinvents himself as his now-iconic alter ego Ziggy Stardust while touring America in 1971, to promote his new album "The Man Who Sold the World."

programme.title: On A Clear Day
programme.desc: A working-class Glasgow shipbuilder suddenly finds himself out of a job and turns his life around by undertaking a challenge to swim the English Channel.

programme.title: Whiskey Galore
programme.desc: When a cargo ship carrying 250,000 bottles of Whisky crashes outside of a small island in Scotland, the locals attempt to gather as many bottles as possible before the local authorities' arrive.

programme.title: Madame Bovary
programme.desc: Bored in her marriage to a country doctor and stifled by life in a small town, the restless Emma Bovary pursues her dreams of passion and excitement, whatever they may cost.

programme.title: The Liability

programme.title: Harry Brown

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When young gang members murder the owner of an upscale Bronx wine store, the CSIs must work to find evidence that ultimately ties someone to the crime.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A celebration marking the release of a report on police corruption ends in bloodshed, when shots ring out on the 65th floor of a Midtown Manhattan high rise.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Detective Mac Taylor and Stella Bonasera discover a dead woman among the sheets at an industry laundry facility.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The home invasion murder of a working class college student sends Detectives Mac and Stella on the trail of China White, uncut heroin that has fallen into the wrong hands.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: After being Caught in the crosshairs, Danny opens fire, but upon investigation learns the man he shot is an undercover cop. Witnesses believe Danny killed the wrong guy and it's up to Mac to prove otherwise.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When the investigation of a vehicular homicide victim collides with a Boston baseball fan found dead in a New York parking lot, Detective Bonasera discovers both victims had one thing in common.

programme.sub-title: What You See Is What You Get

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The investigation of a suburban kid found beaten to death in the snowy woods of Van Cortland Park leads the CSI New York team to Tanglewood, home to small group of wannabe gangsters.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Detectives Mac Taylor and Stella Bonasera uncover the body of a teenaged boy crammed into a 2x2x2 box buried in the sand at Coney Island.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mac and Hawkes investigate the suspicious death of a free climber. Danny and Stella unravel the mystery of a world famous designer, and Aiden revisits an unsolved rape case.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mac and Hawkes explore the gruesome death of a man, murdered in Grand Central Station, while Stella and Danny investigate why a blind woman was left strangled on a rooftop.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: It's mayhem at the Bronx Zoo. Mac, Danny and new CSI Lindsay look into the death of a man thrown to the tigers, and Stella and Hawkes are called in to find an elegantly dressed young woman dead on a carousel.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A man is found beaten to death at the San Gennaro festival leads Mac and Stella from the alleys to the power players of Wall Street. As Hawkes probes the death of a young boy trapped in an apartment fire.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mac, Stella and Lindsay try to discover why a young dancer was thrown from a tram. As Hawkes and Danny wonder if a man's obsession with getting his son into an elite preschool leads to his own death.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: As the CSIs track down a witness to a brutal slaying, they uncover the world of Manhattan "Lolitas", young girls who trawl for older men. A body with two identities is discovered in the boat pond in Central Park.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: CSI Miami Lieutenant Horatio and the entire NY Crime Lab races against the clock to catch a twisted sociopath before he kills again in this second part of the CSI: Miami/CSI: NY crossover episode.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When murder comes to play at a high-stakes poker game, Mac and his team work to find out why. In Central Park's Strawberry Fields, Hawkes and Danny come across a body they instantly recognise: a TV weather girl.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: In a New York doll "hospital", Mac and Danny recover the corpse of the doll "doctor". Meanwhile, Stella and Hawkes find a young woman dead in her apartment.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A roller derby star drops dead in the middle of a match, and Mac and Stella come to the rink to investigate. Hawkes and Danny unravel the mystery of why a struggling novelist was killed.

programme.desc: A billionaire is found dead and when Danny begins to process the scene, he trips a 'panic' button, sealing himself in with the body. And who pushed a stripper onto a 10,000-degree spotlight and left her to sizzle?

programme.desc: Rick explores one of Cornwall's hidden secrets, the secluded and stunning Fowey Estuary, joining his friend on a boat trip to learn about the history of the area and getting a unique view of the beautiful buildings.

programme.title: Rick Stein's Cornwall
programme.desc: On the north Atlantic coast, Rick heads out to sea to go fishing for lobsters with celebrity chef Nathan Outlaw, and learns about a revolutionary new conservation program making lobster fishing sustainable.

programme.title: Food Safari
programme.desc: Searching for the fresh green flavors of Lebanese food.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Ultimate Home Cooking

programme.title: Jamie's Easy Meals For Every Day
programme.desc: Jamie makes a beautiful veggie toad-in-the-hole with portobello mushrooms and a rich porter and onion gravy, then enjoys the perfect steak night date night with Jools.

programme.title: Mary Berry's Simple Comforts
programme.desc: At Henley Rowing Club, Mary makes delicious mixed bean and butternut squash wraps. She is then ferried to the famed Waterside Inn. She is inspired by a river community to make Thai salmon, chicken and dill salad.

programme.desc: It's the final, and for the last remaining bakers, the stakes couldn't be higher as Paul and Prue set three challenges that will test every aspect of the bakers' skills.

programme.title: Jamie's Easy Meals For Every Day
programme.desc: Jamie spices up a barbecue chicken burger, and demonstrates how to dial down the heat for little ones.

programme.desc: Join Alex for two hours of lively debate and news making interviews. Top guests tackle the big issues of the day with Alex's fresh take on every story.

programme.desc: ...Edition. Tomorrow's news, tonight. All the major stories making the front pages and full coverage of all the breaking news at home and abroad with Alex Armstrong.

programme.title: UK National Anthem
programme.desc: God Save the King' is broadcast each morning at 0559 on GB News - Britain's News Channel.

programme.title: Breakfast with Eamonn and Ellie
programme.desc: Join Eamonn Holmes & Ellie Costello to start your day across the United Kingdom. This is your breakfast show. Join the conversation about what is happening in our nation and the world.

programme.title: Britain's Newsroom
programme.desc: Andrew and Miriam present Monday to Thursday mornings. When the news happens, it happens here. But what does it mean for you? GB News brings you the biggest stories and the answers you need from across the UK.

programme.title: Good Afternoon Britain
programme.desc: Tackling the big stories from all angles and perspectives. Weekdays from midday, Tom Harwood and Emily Carver bring you the most compelling stories from across the United Kingdom.

programme.title: Martin Daubney
programme.desc: Join Martin for an up-to-the-minute take on the day's events delivered in his own unique and lively style.

programme.desc: Plain-speaking, straight-talking - Michelle delivers her individual take on the day's news.

programme.title: Bad Boys
programme.desc: Miami cops, Marcus Burnett and Mike Lowrey, have 72 hours to find $100 million worth of heroin that was stolen from the basement of police headquarters.

programme.title: Deep Impact
programme.desc: What would you do if you knew that in a few days a comet would collide with Earth and all humanity could be annihilated? The countdown to doomsday is underway.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible II
programme.desc: A secret agent is sent to Sydney to find and destroy a genetically modified disease called Chimera.

programme.title: Clear and Present Danger
programme.desc: Jack Ryan is called into action when a prominent businessman, who may be connected to Colombian drug cartels, is murdered.

programme.title: Tremors
programme.desc: With the help of a seismology student, Val and Earl discover their desolate town is infested with huge man-eating creatures living below the ground. The race is on to defeat these slimy subterraneans.

programme.title: Jaws

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Elaine dates the man from her wake up service who adores dogs. Grapefruit pulp in George's eye sparks chaos when his winks are misread.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: George picks up a bad habit from some baseball officials. Elaine has a runner as a house guest during the New York City Marathon, while Kramer gets a jacuzzi.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: George and Elaine tire of Jerry's sweet talk. Elaine slips up before the Soup Nazi and is banned from his stall for a year.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: George guards his ATM code from Susan. Elaine is baffled when a man remembers a party in detail but not her.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Elaine invites Susan to a clothing exhibition, which worries Kramer. Jerry befriends his pool guy and cannot shake him.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Finding out that her favoured method of birth control is only available in a limited supply, Elaine must decide if her boyfriend is worthy.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Kramer backs the reopening of an old theatre and watches over a fragile friend. Lloyd's Chinese gum becomes an obsession.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Elaine dates a saxophonist she deems sponge worthy, though he will not do everything. Jerry blabs to a bandmate.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Kramer bonds with a caddy who sharpens his golf game. George's bosses eye a promotion when they think he works earlier and later than everyone.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Elaine strains her neck reaching for a bike, then offers it to whoever fixes her. Susan's cousin gives her baby the name George had saved for his first child.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Jerry surprises his parents by buying them a new car. George reconsiders his engagement when a friend of Elaine tells him that she could have set him up with actress Marisa Tomei.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: George's fixation on Marisa alarms Susan. Elaine rings Jerry in Florida wanting to join him. Elaine gets Marisa's number so George can claim an alibi.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Pre trip tests show traces of opium, so Peterman fires Elaine. Jerry's parents linger in New York while waiting to move back to Florida.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Susan's old roommate hands Jerry a package, and he misplaces his own. Frank turns George's room into a billiard room.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: George is happy because his wedding is delayed three months and excited because Jerry is going to go out with Susan's best friend.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Jerry uses Elaine to prove a clerk wrong about an expensive jacket, and the clerk asks her out. George hosts an unwanted wig master from a Broadway musical.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Sharing a calzone makes George Steinbrenner's pet. Kramer raves about clothes straight from the dryer. Jerry thinks Elaine's boyfriend is dating her without asking.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: George doesn't hear the details on a project that Wilhelm wants him to champion. Peterman wants Elaine to bid on some golf clubs at an auction and gets into a bidding war.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Wilhelm is delighted with the job George did on the project. The detective on the case thinks he's found Jerry's car, damaged beyond recognition.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: After George's off hand remark, Jerry and Elaine await a couple's split. Elaine debuts a new hairdo and resumes driving, which makes Jerry carsick.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: With the wedding nearing, George and Susan order invitations. Jerry meets Jeannie, his female counterpart, after nearly geting hit by a car..

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: As George tries to put Susan behind him, Elaine is given control of J Peterman's business.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: George is suspected of killing his own fiancee, while Kramer falls for Jerry's new girlfriend.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Elaine meets three friends who are the exact opposite of Jerry, George and Kramer. Then, George uses Susan's death to attract women.

programme.title: NHK NEWSLINE
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: Chatroom Japan
programme.desc: Chatroom Japan empowers international residents in Japan to share their experiences and connect with each other.

programme.title: IMPACTS: Climates Change the World
programme.desc: Due to global warming, the bamboo habitat range in Japan is expanding and abandoned bamboo groves are encroaching on forests and farmland nationwide. How should we associate with this iconic plant?

programme.title: DESIGN MUSEUM JAPAN
programme.desc: Igarashi Hisae (Interior designer) visits Osaka. Glass was a key industry in Osaka from the early 1900s. Igarashi learns how glassblowers used their skills to make Japanese vacuum flasks.

programme.title: The Factory Wonders
programme.desc: We explore a factory in Sagamihara where they make machines that skewer ingredients for famous Japanese foods like yakitori and oden. How do they ensure each piece is cooked to soft, juicy perfection?

programme.title: Time-lapse Japan
programme.desc: Cape Ashizuri is known for its rugged cliffs and unusual rocks. A strong current off its coast has caused many accidents. Enjoy the scenery at the cape, a place of worship, in time-lapse.

programme.title: NHK NEWSLINE
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: The Seasons of Yamato
programme.sub-title: Grain in Ear / The 24 Solar Terms
programme.desc: A series of poetic videos by Koichi Hozan, a videographer living in Nara, in collaboration with a pianist, Mine Kawakami, for which she plays exclusive pieces, makes you experience each season.

programme.title: BOSAI:Science that Can Save Your Life
programme.desc: 100 years ago, on September 1, 1923, a major earthquake struck Japan. The Great Kanto Earthquake left an estimated 105,000 people dead or missing, yet most of the victims perished in fires. Why?

programme.title: Magical Japanese
programme.desc: The Japanese language is rich in words and expressions influenced by nature, history, and culture. This episode looks at words related to sleep. Explore the unique culture behind them.

programme.title: Easy Japanese
programme.desc: #23 I like this cat. / To express what you like, say the name of a person, place, or thing and "ga suki desu."

programme.title: Culture Crossroads

programme.sub-title: Inner Conflict of the Human Soul

programme.title: Japan in Focus
programme.desc: A construction firm in Hokkaido pours efforts into restoring old Japanese-style houses. They're also dedicated to preserving the traditional methods used to build those homes that can last centuries.

programme.title: BOSAI:Science that Can Save Your Life
programme.desc: 100 years ago, on September 1, 1923, a major earthquake struck Japan. The Great Kanto Earthquake left an estimated 105,000 people dead or missing, yet most of the victims perished in fires. Why?

programme.title: IMPACTS: Climates Change the World
programme.desc: Due to global warming, the bamboo habitat range in Japan is expanding and abandoned bamboo groves are encroaching on forests and farmland nationwide. How should we associate with this iconic plant?

programme.title: Time-lapse Japan
programme.desc: Amami Oshima is a World Natural Heritage Site, with rare flora and fauna including many endemic species. Explore the biodiversity of its lush, subtropical forests in stunning time-lapse footage.

programme.title: Nun's Seasonal Calendar
programme.desc: In this episode, we learn about boshu and geshi, two dates from early summer. The chefs prepare ume plums and tea leaves and teach us how to make a pair of refreshing summer dishes.

programme.title: One in Every Japanese

programme.title: Ukiyoe EDO-LIFE
programme.sub-title: Eat, Drink and Enjoy the Flowers

programme.title: Hometown Stories
programme.sub-title: Learning Japanese One Step at a Time
programme.desc: A high school allows students with international roots to use their native language while learning Japanese. Teachers hope it will help them build confidence and adapt better to their environment.

programme.title: Satoyama Kitchen Spring
programme.sub-title: Field Work Fueled by Leaf-wrapped Sushi
programme.desc: Hi, it's me, Tama! When I saw a rainbow this morning, I got the feeling there'd be something yummy for me today, and I was right! Grandma Nobuko and Grandpa Makoto are making leaf- wrapped sushi. I can't wait!

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles III
programme.desc: When a magic sceptre accidentally transports April back through time to 16th-century Japan, the boys take off in hot pursuit, cowabungling their way right out of the sewers.

programme.title: Wasabi
programme.desc: The death of a ex-lover puts a French cop on a collision course with the Yakuza and the daughter he never knew he had.

programme.title: God is a Bullet
programme.desc: After his ex-wife is murdered and his daughter is kidnapped, Bob Hightower, infiltrates the group to hunt down their leader with the help of the cult's only female victim escapee.

programme.title: The Last Stop in Yuma County
programme.desc: Stranded at an Arizona rest stop, a travelling knife salesman gets thrust into a high-stakes hostage situation by the arrival of two bank robbers who will stop at nothing to protect their ill-begotten fortune.

programme.title: Arctic
programme.desc: Sole-survivor of a plane crash, and stranded deep within the Arctic Circle, Overgard is waiting to be rescued, when a sudden turn of events finds him no longer on his own.

programme.title: I Spit On Your Grave
programme.desc: An aspiring writer is sexually abused and left for dead by four men. She systematically hunts them down to seek revenge, inflicting upon them every horrifying and torturous moment they carried out on her.

programme.title: The Texas Chain Saw Massacre
programme.desc: Teenagers are tortured, chopped up and impaled on meat hooks by a demented backwards family. This grisly 1974 blood-curdler ranks with Psycho and Halloween as a landmark in the horror/slasher genre.

programme.title: Puppet Master
programme.desc: After being contacted by their mysterious former colleague, four psychics arrive at a secluded hotel where they are stalked by a group of murderous puppets.

programme.title: Puppet Master II
programme.desc: The malicious marionettes are back to resurrect their dead master and evict parapsychologists from the family estate.

programme.title: Puppet Master III: Toulon's Revenge
programme.desc: Gestapo agents face killer dolls when they murder puppeteer Toulon's wife in this prequel to "Puppet Master".

programme.title: The House That Jack Built
programme.desc: USA in the 1970s. We follow the highly intelligent Jack over a span of 12 years and are introduced to the murders that define his development as a serial killer.

programme.title: The Hit
programme.desc: A hit man is sent to Spain to kidnap an ex-criminal and transport him to Paris for execution.

programme.title: The Chaser
programme.desc: A cop investigates the disappearance of several call girls he pimps out.

programme.title: The Wind
programme.desc: Lizzy is settling a remote stretch of land on the 19th-century American frontier, when she begins to sense a sinister presence that seems to be borne of the land itself.

programme.title: I Saw The Devil
programme.desc: The line between good and evil begins to blur when a special agent goes on the hunt for a serial killer who brutally murdered his pregnant fiancee.

programme.title: Possession
programme.desc: A woman starts exhibiting increasingly disturbing behavior after asking her husband for a divorce. Suspicions of infidelity soon give way to something much more sinister.

programme.title: The Parts You Lose
programme.desc: A young boy in a small North Dakota town befriends a potentially dangerous fugitive.

programme.title: Naked Weapon
programme.desc: A group of girls are kidnapped and trained to become assassins for a criminal organisation, ruled over by the ruthless Madam M.

programme.title: The Autopsy of Jane Doe
programme.desc: A father and son, both coroners, are pulled into a complex mystery while attempting to identify the body of a young woman.

programme.title: The Stunt man
programme.desc: A fugitive stumbles onto a movie set just when they need a new stunt man, takes the job as a way to hide out and falls for the leading lady while facing off with his manipulative director.

programme.title: Final Cut
programme.desc: Life imitates art when the cast and crew of a low-budget zombie flick start to turn into the living dead.

programme.title: Joint Security Area
programme.desc: After a shooting incident at the North-South Korean border DMZ leaves two North Korean soldiers dead, a neutral Swiss and Swedish team investigates what actually happened.

programme.title: The Fall
programme.desc: A bedridden stuntman entrances a little girl with tales of exotic heroes. As his health reaches the point of peril so does the story he's telling, with dramatic consequences. An epic fantasy.

programme.title: The Science of Sleep
programme.desc: A man entranced by his dreams and imagination is love-struck with a French woman and feels he can show her his world.

programme.title: Heathers
programme.desc: Veronica meets a James Dean-type newcomer who suggests they kill off the popular kids and end the cruel, unfair treatment the girls impose on unpopular kids at school.

programme.title: Memento
programme.desc: A story told both forwards and backwards in time about an ex- insurance investigator, unable to remember new thoughts, who uses notes and tattoos to hunt for the man he thinks killed his wife.

programme.title: Cops vs Thugs
programme.desc: A dirty cop is forced to choose between the police and his yakuza buddies when a new boss arrives in his precinct.

programme.title: Following
programme.desc: A young London writer follows strangers for inspiration, but his hobby becomes an obsession, leading him further into their lives than he ever intended.

programme.title: Dark Diamond
programme.desc: After his father's death, a man vows vengeance against the relatives who abandoned him.

programme.title: Dobermann
programme.desc: The Dobermann and his gang have been hitting the headlines. Banks, post-offices, bullion vans! The whole works! An anthology of robbery, a compilation of hold-ups!

programme.title: District B13
programme.desc: Captain Damien must team up with Leito, a local insurgent from District 13, to defuse a neutron bomb that has fallen into the hands of a local drug lord, Taha, and rescue Leito's sister Lola.

programme.title: Pusher
programme.desc: A failed drug deal lands Frank in debt to a ruthless and dangerous Copenhagen drug lord.

programme.title: The Wild Goose Lake
programme.desc: On the run, gangster Zhou connects with sex worker Liu Aiai who was instructed to bring him in.

programme.title: Shutter
programme.desc: Late one night on a country road, Tun and Jane accidentally run over a mysterious pedestrian. Fleeing the scene, they return to their lives in Bangkok, but soon discover things have changed.

programme.title: Suspiria
programme.desc: A girl enrols in an upmarket ballet academy, only to realise that the school is a front for something much more sinister and supernatural.

programme.title: Quest for Fire
programme.desc: A prehistoric Cro-Magnon tribe depends on an ever-burning source of fire, which eventually extinguishes. Lacking the knowledge of how to start a new one, the tribe sends three warriors on a quest.

programme.title: Day of the Dead
programme.desc: The flesh-eating undead have wiped out every last vestige of the civilised world. Deep underground, a group of scientists and soldiers work to find a cure for the unstoppable plague.

programme.title: The Crying Game
programme.desc: A reluctant IRA agent discovers that some people just aren't who you expect them to be.

programme.title: Good Boy
programme.desc: Christian, a millionaire heir, meets Sigrid, a young student, on a dating app. They hit it off, but there's only one problem: Christian lives with Frank, a man who dresses up and constantly acts like a dog.

programme.title: Upstream Color
programme.desc: A woman is abducted and hypnotised with an organic material harvested from a specific flower. When she falls for a man, the two realise he may also have been subjected to the same process.

programme.title: Under The Silver Lake
programme.desc: Sam, a disenchanted 33-year-old finds a mysterious woman in his apartment's pool. When she vanishes, he embarks on a quest across LA, leading him down a path of mystery.

programme.title: Lords of Chaos
programme.desc: The origins of Norwegian Black Metal and a group of young men with a flair for publicity, church-burning...and murder.

programme.title: Vesper
programme.desc: Struggling to survive with her father after the collapse of Earth's ecosystem, 13-year-old Vesper must use her wits, strength and bio-hacking abilities to fight for the future.

programme.title: Hardware
programme.desc: In an America ravaged by atomic warfare, nomads spend their days scavenging for scrap. That's how an ex-soldier acquires spare android parts, which turn into a robot programmed to destroy humans.

programme.title: Children of the Corn
programme.desc: While driving through Nebraska two young lovers stumble upon a cult made up of murderous, demon-worshiping children. Based on a Stephen King horror story.

programme.title: Children of the Corn II: Final Sacrifice
programme.desc: When the mutilated bodies of adults are found in Nebraska no one believes that the killers could be children hiding in the cornfields. A journalist covering the story delves into the truth.

programme.title: Children of the Corn III: Urban Harvest
programme.desc: Act three in the horror series based on a Stephen King story. Two brothers are adopted by a family. Deadly occurrences follow, amid revelations that one boy was in a bizarre cult in Nebraska.

programme.title: Audition
programme.desc: A widower accepts his friend's offer to audition girls in order to search for his new wife. However, the girl he likes does not appear to be the one she claims to be.

programme.title: The Hitcher
programme.desc: A young man who escapes the clutches of a murderous hitchhiker is subsequently stalked by the hitcher and framed for his crimes.

programme.title: Black Robe
programme.desc: In 1634 a Jesuit missionary sets out to convert the tribes in Huron Indian country. A culture-clashing masterpiece from Australian director Bruce Beresford.

programme.title: Dollman vs. Demonic Toys
programme.desc: Judith Grey teams with Brick Bardo (Dollman) and his girlfriend Ginger to face the evil Demonic Toys for one final battle.

programme.title: Jungle
programme.desc: An enthusiastic young adventurer follows his dreams into the Amazon jungle with two friends and a guide with a mysterious past.

programme.title: Border Security: International
programme.desc: Canadian Border Services Officers work on the front lines, intercepting suspicious travellers and contraband from around the world to help keep Canada safe.

programme.title: Border Security: Australia's Front Line
programme.desc: An Asian woman throws a tantrum when prohibited goods are found; traces of a date-rape drug are found in a Chinese man's bag; a German man arrives with little clothing.

programme.title: Police Ten 7
programme.desc: Join Rob Lemoto for a closer look at the dramatic working lives of New Zealand's police force and the Kiwis who end up on the wrong side of the law.

programme.title: Highway Patrol
programme.desc: A roadside rumble erupts when a fired up driver with no licence and the wrong plates tries to take on an officer. Officers try to determine the cause of a smash on a freeway and handle a hoon with an attitude.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Police officers across the US patrol the streets, targeting car thieves, drug dealers, and violent offenders to stop anyone stepping onto the wrong side of the law.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Passengers spill out during a chase. A suspect's dubious item raises questions. Stolen vehicle occupants blame a mysterious woman.

programme.title: Cops Reloaded

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: The growing Regulator threat forces Jamie, Claire and Roger to embark on a mission to raise a militia.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Roger leads Jamie's militia to the trading post of Brownsville and finds himself in a feud. Jamie and Claire arrive to find that Roger's unusual strategy may have cost them the loyalty of the militia.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Jamie and his militia arrive at Hillsborough to learn that Governor Tryon has proposed a rather unorthodox solution to deal with the threat posed by the Regulators and to resolve the political crisis.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: At Jocasta's wedding, Jamie learns Tryon's true motivation for ending the Regulator threat.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: The Regulator Rebellion reaches a boiling point, forcing Jamie to face his fear and confront the consequence of his divided loyalties.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: The Frasers must come to terms with all that has changed in the aftermath of the Battle of Alamance Creek. Brianna tries to help Roger overcome the trauma he has endured.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: When Jamie is bitten by a venomous snake, Claire fears she may not have the resources to save him. Jamie asks Roger to complete an important task in the event of his death.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Jamie and Roger implement their plan to eliminate the threat looming over them, but it goes awry. Brianna is forced to confront her greatest fear and fight for her and her son's lives.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: A revelation about Jemmy forces Roger and Brianna to choose between staying in the 18th century, or returning to the safety of the future.
